members.name: _GetChannels
members.summary: Returns the number of audio channels.

members.name: _GetLength
members.summary: Returns the video duration in seconds, if known, or 0 if unknown.

members.name: _GetMixRate
members.summary: Returns the audio sample rate used for mixing.

members.name: _GetPlaybackPosition
members.summary: Return the current playback timestamp. Called in response to the [member VideoStreamPlayer.stream_position] getter.

members.name: _GetTexture
members.summary: Allocates a [Texture2D] in which decoded video frames will be drawn.

members.name: _IsPaused
members.summary: Returns the paused status, as set by [method _set_paused].

members.name: _IsPlaying
members.summary: Returns the playback state, as determined by calls to [method _play] and [method _stop].

members.name: _Play
members.summary: Called in response to [member VideoStreamPlayer.autoplay] or [method VideoStreamPlayer.play]. Note that manual playback may also invoke [method _stop] multiple times before this method is called. [method _is_playing] should return [code]true[/code] once playing.

members.name: _Seek
members.summary: Seeks to [param time] seconds. Called in response to the [member VideoStreamPlayer.stream_position] setter.

members.name: _SetAudioTrack
members.summary: Select the audio track [param idx]. Called when playback starts, and in response to the [member VideoStreamPlayer.audio_track] setter.

members.name: _SetPaused
members.summary: Set the paused status of video playback. [method _is_paused] must return [param paused]. Called in response to the [member VideoStreamPlayer.paused] setter.

members.name: _Stop
members.summary: Stops playback. May be called multiple times before [method _play], or in response to [method VideoStreamPlayer.stop]. [method _is_playing] should return [code]false[/code] once stopped.

members.name: _Update
members.summary: Ticks video playback for [param delta] seconds. Called every frame as long as both [method _is_paused] and [method _is_playing] return [code]true[/code].

members.name: MixAudio
members.signature: public int MixAudio(int numFrames, PackedFloat32Array buffer, int offset)
members.summary: Render [param num_frames] audio frames (of [method _get_channels] floats each) from [param buffer], starting from index [param offset] in the array. Returns the number of audio frames rendered, or -1 on error.
